cases.query: review the code from the last sprint
expectations: The response infers scope from recent git history (git log + git diff)
The response reads changed files and evaluates code quality, security, consistency, and test coverage
The response generates a review artifact (ARE - * Code Review.md) in the project's reviews directory
The response presents a summary with file count, issue counts by severity, and verdict
cases.notes: Core invocation — infers scope, reviews, produces artifact, presents summary

cases.query: review these files: src/auth/login.ts src/auth/session.ts src/middleware/cors.ts
expectations: The response reads and reviews exactly the three specified files
The response checks for security issues especially in auth-related files
The response generates a review artifact with a Files Reviewed table
The response offers to auto-fix non-controversial issues via AskUserQuestion
cases.notes: Explicit file list — reviews only the specified files, not the full diff

cases.query: PR review on the signal engine implementation
expectations: The response finds the plan file for signal engine to understand implementation intent
Issues are marked with severity: Critical (C), Warning (W), or Info (I)
The response flags any dead imports, unused variables, or code that doesn't match codebase patterns
The review artifact includes a Verdict section (Ready to merge / Merge after fixes / Needs rework)
cases.notes: Plan-aware review — reads the plan to understand what was intended, catches issues like dead code

cases.query: create a plan for the new dashboard feature
expectations: The response invokes /plan-spec or asks for a spec path
The response does NOT run code review steps or generate a review artifact

cases.query: review this spec before we plan it
expectations: The response invokes /review-spec or dispatches the spec review team
The response does NOT read code files or generate a code review artifact
cases.notes: Spec review request — this is /review-spec, not /pr-review
